ingest_change.description: ingest a change request A after stage gate is passed
preconditions: I can only ingest a change request A after stage gate is passed if it is not the case that the change request A is registered and it is not the case that stage gate is passed for A
effects: Once I ingest a change request A after stage gate is passed, it is the case that the change request A is registered

reserve_executor_slot.description: reserve an executor slot B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve an executor slot B for a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
I can only reserve an executor slot B for a change request A if it is not the case that A has an executor allocation
effects: Once I reserve an executor slot B for a change request A, it is the case that the executor slot B is reserved for the change request A and A has an executor allocation
Once I reserve an executor slot B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_executor_slot.description: release an executor slot B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only release an executor slot B from a change request A if it is the case that the executor slot B is reserved for the change request A
I can only release an executor slot B from a change request A if it is not the case that the execution of the stage for A is flagged and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I release an executor slot B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an executor slot B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that the executor slot B is reserved for the change request A and it is not the case anymore that A has an executor allocation and it is not the case anymore that A is preparation ready and it is not the case anymore that the environment for A is configured and it is not the case anymore that review is assigned for A and it is not the case anymore that stage execution is confirmed for A and it is not the case anymore that a security scan was reported for A

claim_workspace_slot.description: claim a workspace slot B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only claim a workspace slot B for a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available in the workspace
effects: Once I claim a workspace slot B for a change request A, it is the case that A is bound to the workspace slot B
Once I claim a workspace slot B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the workspace

release_workspace_slot.description: release a workspace slot B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only release a workspace slot B from a change request A if it is the case that A is bound to the workspace slot B
effects: Once I release a workspace slot B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available in the workspace
Once I release a workspace slot B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the workspace slot B

confirm_workspace_provision.description: confirm workspace provision for a change request A with a workspace slot B
preconditions: I can only confirm workspace provision for a change request A with a workspace slot B if it is the case that the change request A is registered and A has an executor allocation and A is bound to the workspace slot B
I can only confirm workspace provision for a change request A with a workspace slot B if it is not the case that A is preparation ready
effects: Once I confirm workspace provision for a change request A with a workspace slot B, it is the case that A is preparation ready

assign_reviewer.description: assign a reviewer B to a change request A
preconditions: I can only assign a reviewer B to a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and A has an executor allocation and B is available
I can only assign a reviewer B to a change request A if it is not the case that A is preparation ready
effects: Once I assign a reviewer B to a change request A, it is the case that A is preparation ready and review is assigned for A
Once I assign a reviewer B to a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

provision_with_operator_credential.description: provision a change request A in a workspace slot B using an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only provision a change request A in a workspace slot B using an operator credential C if it is the case that A is preparation ready and A has an executor allocation and A is bound to the workspace slot B and C is available
I can only provision a change request A in a workspace slot B using an operator credential C if it is not the case that the environment for A is configured
effects: Once I provision a change request A in a workspace slot B using an operator credential C, it is the case that the environment for A is configured
Once I provision a change request A in a workspace slot B using an operator credential C, it is not the case anymore that review is assigned for A

complete_ci_tool_configuration.description: complete CI tool configuration for a change request A using a ci tool instance B
preconditions: I can only complete CI tool configuration for a change request A using a ci tool instance B if it is the case that A has an executor allocation and B is invoked for A
I can only complete CI tool configuration for a change request A using a ci tool instance B if it is not the case that the environment for A is configured
effects: Once I complete CI tool configuration for a change request A using a ci tool instance B, it is the case that the environment for A is configured
Once I complete CI tool configuration for a change request A using a ci tool instance B, it is not the case anymore that review is assigned for A

reserve_test_suite.description: reserve a test suite B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve a test suite B for a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a test suite B for a change request A, it is the case that A is bound to the test suite B
Once I reserve a test suite B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_test_suite.description: release a test suite B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only release a test suite B from a change request A if it is the case that A is bound to the test suite B
effects: Once I release a test suite B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a test suite B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the test suite B

bind_policy.description: bind a policy B to a change request A
preconditions: I can only bind a policy B to a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I bind a policy B to a change request A, it is the case that A is bound to the policy B
Once I bind a policy B to a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_policy.description: unbind a policy B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only unbind a policy B from a change request A if it is the case that A is bound to the policy B
effects: Once I unbind a policy B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a policy B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the policy B

reserve_security_scan.description: reserve a security scan job B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve a security scan job B for a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available for a security scan and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a security scan job B for a change request A, it is the case that A is bound to the security scan job B
Once I reserve a security scan job B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for a security scan

release_security_scan.description: release a security scan job B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only release a security scan job B from a change request A if it is the case that A is bound to the security scan job B
effects: Once I release a security scan job B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available for a security scan
Once I release a security scan job B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the security scan job B

reserve_external_dependency.description: reserve an external dependency B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve an external dependency B for a change request A if it is the case that the change request A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve an external dependency B for a change request A, it is the case that A is bound to the external dependency B
Once I reserve an external dependency B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_external_dependency.description: release an external dependency B from a change request A
preconditions: I can only release an external dependency B from a change request A if it is the case that A is bound to the external dependency B
effects: Once I release an external dependency B from a change request A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an external dependency B from a change request A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the external dependency B

execute_stage_tests.description: execute stage tests for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a test suite C and a policy D
preconditions: I can only execute stage tests for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a test suite C and a policy D if it is the case that A has an executor allocation and A is bound to the test suite C and A is bound to the policy D and B is available and B is compatible with A
I can only execute stage tests for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a test suite C and a policy D if it is not the case that the execution of the stage for A is flagged
effects: Once I execute stage tests for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a test suite C and a policy D, it is the case that the execution of B for A is recorded and the execution of the stage for A is flagged
Once I execute stage tests for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a test suite C and a policy D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_security_scan.description: execute security scan for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a security scan job C and an infrastructure resource D
preconditions: I can only execute security scan for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a security scan job C and an infrastructure resource D if it is the case that A has an executor allocation and A is bound to the security scan job C and D is available and B is available and B is compatible with A and D is compatible with A

I can only execute security scan for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a security scan job C and an infrastructure resource D if it is not the case that the execution of the stage for A is flagged
effects: Once I execute security scan for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a security scan job C and an infrastructure resource D, it is the case that the execution of B for A is recorded and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and a security scan was reported for A and review is assigned for A

Once I execute security scan for a change request A in a pipeline stage B using a security scan job C and an infrastructure resource D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_scan_review_flags.description: finalize scan review flags for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C
preconditions: I can only finalize scan review flags for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C if it is the case that the execution of the stage for A is flagged and a security scan was reported for A and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the policy C
effects: Once I finalize scan review flags for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C, it is not the case anymore that a security scan was reported for A and it is not the case anymore that review is assigned for A

grant_manual_approval.description: grant manual approval for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C by a manual approver D
preconditions: I can only grant manual approval for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C by a manual approver D if it is the case that the environment for A is configured and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the policy C and D is assigned to A

I can only grant manual approval for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C by a manual approver D if it is not the case that review is assigned for A and it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I grant manual approval for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C by a manual approver D, it is the case that approval is granted for A

grant_automated_approval.description: grant automated approval for a change request A using a security scan job B and an external dependency C with an automated gate D
preconditions: I can only grant automated approval for a change request A using a security scan job B and an external dependency C with an automated gate D if it is the case that the environment for A is configured and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and A is bound to the security scan job B and A is bound to the external dependency C and D is assigned to A
I can only grant automated approval for a change request A using a security scan job B and an external dependency C with an automated gate D if it is not the case that approval is granted for A
effects: Once I grant automated approval for a change request A using a security scan job B and an external dependency C with an automated gate D, it is the case that approval is granted for A and review is assigned for A

mark_stage_execution_success.description: mark stage execution success for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C
preconditions: I can only mark stage execution success for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C if it is the case that approval is granted for A and review is assigned for A and A is bound to the test suite B and A is bound to the policy C
effects: Once I mark stage execution success for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C, it is the case that stage execution is confirmed for A

Once I mark stage execution success for a change request A using a test suite B and a policy C, it is not the case anymore that review is assigned for A and it is not the case anymore that the environment for A is configured and it is not the case anymore that a security scan was reported for A

provision_workspace_with_credentials.description: provision workspace a workspace slot B with an operator credential C for a change request A
preconditions: I can only provision workspace a workspace slot B with an operator credential C for a change request A if it is the case that stage execution is confirmed for A and approval is granted for A and A has an executor allocation and A is bound to the workspace slot B and C is available
I can only provision workspace a workspace slot B with an operator credential C for a change request A if it is not the case that the environment for A is configured
effects: Once I provision workspace a workspace slot B with an operator credential C for a change request A, it is the case that the environment for A is configured

request_ci_tool_binding.description: request CI tool binding for a change request A in a workspace slot B
preconditions: I can only request CI tool binding for a change request A in a workspace slot B if it is the case that approval is granted for A and the environment for A is configured and A is bound to the workspace slot B
I can only request CI tool binding for a change request A in a workspace slot B if it is not the case that review is assigned for A and it is not the case that ci tool binding is requested for A
effects: Once I request CI tool binding for a change request A in a workspace slot B, it is the case that ci tool binding is requested for A

reserve_reviewer_for_ci_tool_binding.description: reserve a reviewer B for CI tool binding of a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve a reviewer B for CI tool binding of a change request A if it is the case that approval is granted for A and the environment for A is configured and B is available
I can only reserve a reviewer B for CI tool binding of a change request A if it is not the case that review is assigned for A and it is not the case that ci tool binding is requested for A
effects: Once I reserve a reviewer B for CI tool binding of a change request A, it is the case that ci tool binding is requested for A
Once I reserve a reviewer B for CI tool binding of a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_ci_tool_instance.description: reserve a CI tool instance B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only reserve a CI tool instance B for a change request A if it is the case that ci tool binding is requested for A and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a CI tool instance B for a change request A, it is the case that B is bound to A
Once I reserve a CI tool instance B for a change request A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

invoke_ci_tool_for_merge_commit.description: invoke a CI tool instance C for a merge commit variant A associated with a pull request variant B
preconditions: I can only invoke a CI tool instance C for a merge commit variant A associated with a pull request variant B if it is the case that the change request A is registered and A is a merge commit and the preferred ci tool for A is C and C is bound to B
I can only invoke a CI tool instance C for a merge commit variant A associated with a pull request variant B if it is not the case that C is invoked for A
effects: Once I invoke a CI tool instance C for a merge commit variant A associated with a pull request variant B, it is the case that C is invoked for A

complete_operator_setup.description: complete operator setup for a change request A using a workspace slot B with an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only complete operator setup for a change request A using a workspace slot B with an operator credential C if it is the case that the change request A is registered and A is a merge commit and the environment for A is configured and ci tool binding is requested for A and A is bound to the workspace slot B and C is available
I can only complete operator setup for a change request A using a workspace slot B with an operator credential C if it is not the case that the operator setup for A is completed
effects: Once I complete operator setup for a change request A using a workspace slot B with an operator credential C, it is the case that the operator setup for A is completed

finalize_pull_request_stage_gate.description: finalize pull request stage gate for a change request A
preconditions: I can only finalize pull request stage gate for a change request A if it is the case that A is a pull request and the change request A is registered and A has an executor allocation and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and approval is granted for A and ci tool binding is requested for A and the environment for A is configured
I can only finalize pull request stage gate for a change request A if it is not the case that stage gate is passed for A
effects: Once I finalize pull request stage gate for a change request A, it is the case that stage gate is passed for A

finalize_stage_gate_with_ci_tool.description: finalize stage gate with a ci tool instance B for a change request A
preconditions: I can only finalize stage gate with a ci tool instance B for a change request A if it is the case that A is a merge commit and the change request A is registered and A has an executor allocation and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and approval is granted for A and ci tool binding is requested for A and the environment for A is configured and B is invoked for A
I can only finalize stage gate with a ci tool instance B for a change request A if it is not the case that stage gate is passed for A
effects: Once I finalize stage gate with a ci tool instance B for a change request A, it is the case that stage gate is passed for A

finalize_stage_gate_with_operator_setup.description: finalize stage gate with operator setup for a change request A
preconditions: I can only finalize stage gate with operator setup for a change request A if it is the case that A is a merge commit and the change request A is registered and A has an executor allocation and the execution of the stage for A is flagged and approval is granted for A and ci tool binding is requested for A and the environment for A is configured and the operator setup for A is completed
I can only finalize stage gate with operator setup for a change request A if it is not the case that stage gate is passed for A
effects: Once I finalize stage gate with operator setup for a change request A, it is the case that stage gate is passed for A

action_nl_templates.ingest_change: ingest change request {?change_request} after stage gate is passed

action_nl_templates.release_executor_slot: release executor slot {?executor_slot} from change request {?change_request}

action_nl_templates.release_test_suite: release test suite {?test_suite} from change request {?change_request}

action_nl_templates.release_security_scan: release security scan job {?security_scan_job} from change request {?change_request}

action_nl_templates.execute_security_scan: execute security scan for change request {?change_request} in pipeline stage {?pipeline_stage} using security scan job {?security_scan_job} and infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource}
action_nl_templates.finalize_scan_review_flags: finalize scan review flags for change request {?change_request} using test suite {?test_suite} and policy {?policy}
action_nl_templates.grant_manual_approval: grant manual approval for change request {?change_request} using test suite {?test_suite} and policy {?policy} by manual approver {?manual_approver}

action_nl_templates.invoke_ci_tool_for_merge_commit: invoke CI tool instance {?ci_tool_instance} for merge commit variant {?merge_commit_variant} associated with pull request variant {?pull_request_variant}
action_nl_templates.complete_operator_setup: complete operator setup for change request {?change_request} using workspace slot {?workspace_slot} with operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates.finalize_pull_request_stage_gate: finalize pull request stage gate for change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates.finalize_stage_gate_with_ci_tool: finalize stage gate with ci tool instance {?ci_tool_instance} for change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates.finalize_stage_gate_with_operator_setup: finalize stage gate with operator setup for change request {?change_request}

predicate_nl_templates.executor_reserved: the executor slot {?executor_slot} is reserved for the change request {?change_request}
predicate_nl_templates.test_suite_bound: {?change_request} is bound to the test suite {?test_suite}
predicate_nl_templates.security_scan_bound: {?change_request} is bound to the security scan job {?security_scan_job}
predicate_nl_templates.dependency_bound: {?change_request} is bound to the external dependency {?external_dependency}
predicate_nl_templates.stage_execution_recorded: the execution of {?pipeline_stage} for {?change_request} is recorded
predicate_nl_templates.stage_execution_flag: the execution of the stage for {?change_request} is flagged
predicate_nl_templates.ci_tool_binding_requested: ci tool binding is requested for {?change_request}
predicate_nl_templates.preferred_ci_tool_for_change: the preferred ci tool for {?change_request} is {?ci_tool_instance}
predicate_nl_templates.operator_setup_completed: the operator setup for {?change_request} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.security_scan_available: {?security_scan_job} is available for a security scan
predicate_nl_templates.workspace_bound: {?change_request} is bound to the workspace slot {?workspace_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.security_scan_reported: a security scan was reported for {?change_request}

action_nl_templates_indef.ingest_change: ingest a change request {?change_request} after stage gate is passed
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_executor_slot: reserve an executor slot {?executor_slot} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_executor_slot: release an executor slot {?executor_slot} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.claim_workspace_slot: claim a workspace slot {?workspace_slot} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_workspace_slot: release a workspace slot {?workspace_slot} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_workspace_provision: confirm workspace provision for a change request {?change_request} with a workspace slot {?workspace_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_reviewer: assign a reviewer {?reviewer} to a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.provision_with_operator_credential: provision a change request {?change_request} in a workspace slot {?workspace_slot} using an operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_ci_tool_configuration: complete CI tool configuration for a change request {?change_request} using a ci tool instance {?ci_tool_instance}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_test_suite: reserve a test suite {?test_suite} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_test_suite: release a test suite {?test_suite} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_policy: bind a policy {?policy} to a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_policy: unbind a policy {?policy} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_security_scan: reserve a security scan job {?security_scan_job} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_security_scan: release a security scan job {?security_scan_job} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_external_dependency: reserve an external dependency {?external_dependency} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_dependency: release an external dependency {?external_dependency} from a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_stage_tests: execute stage tests for a change request {?change_request} in a pipeline stage {?pipeline_stage} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a policy {?policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_security_scan: execute security scan for a change request {?change_request} in a pipeline stage {?pipeline_stage} using a security scan job {?security_scan_job} and an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_scan_review_flags: finalize scan review flags for a change request {?change_request} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a policy {?policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_manual_approval: grant manual approval for a change request {?change_request} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a policy {?policy} by a manual approver {?manual_approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_automated_approval: grant automated approval for a change request {?change_request} using a security scan job {?security_scan_job} and an external dependency {?external_dependency} with an automated gate {?automated_gate}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_stage_execution_success: mark stage execution success for a change request {?change_request} using a test suite {?test_suite} and a policy {?policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.provision_workspace_with_credentials: provision workspace a workspace slot {?workspace_slot} with an operator credential {?operator_credential} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_ci_tool_binding: request CI tool binding for a change request {?change_request} in a workspace slot {?workspace_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_reviewer_for_ci_tool_binding: reserve a reviewer {?reviewer} for CI tool binding of a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_ci_tool_instance: reserve a CI tool instance {?ci_tool_instance} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.invoke_ci_tool_for_merge_commit: invoke a CI tool instance {?ci_tool_instance} for a merge commit variant {?merge_commit_variant} associated with a pull request variant {?pull_request_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_operator_setup: complete operator setup for a change request {?change_request} using a workspace slot {?workspace_slot} with an operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_pull_request_stage_gate: finalize pull request stage gate for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_stage_gate_with_ci_tool: finalize stage gate with a ci tool instance {?ci_tool_instance} for a change request {?change_request}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_stage_gate_with_operator_setup: finalize stage gate with operator setup for a change request {?change_request}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a change request or a executor slot or a pipeline stage or a policy or a test suite or a security scan job or a workspace slot or a reviewer or a ci tool instance or a operator credential or a infrastructure resource or a external dependency or a capacity group is also a object
Everything that is a manual approver or a automated gate is also a capacity group
Everything that is a pull request variant or a merge commit variant is also a change request
